title: cynoglossum fornicatum
intro: Cynoglossum fornicatum, also known as forked hound's-tongue, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. The health benefits of Cynoglossum fornicatum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, Cynoglossum fornicatum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
